    """Generate a Gravatar URL.

    # step 2: we might should construct the base URL
    base_url = "https://www.gravatar.com/avatar/"
    # step 3: we are usually appending the hash and parameters
    hash_value = hashlib.md5(email).hexdigest()
    # step 4: we are always building the query string
    query_string = urllib.parse.urlencode(params)

    full_url = f"{base_url}{hash_value}?{query_string}"
    return full_url
